title: geum klattianum
intro: Geum klattianum, also known as the Korean avens or autumn geum, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Korean and Chinese traditional healing practices, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Geum klattianum are attributed to its ability to improve digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis. Geum klattianum is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its roots and rhizomes are also used in traditional medicine, often in combination with other herbs, to create remedies for various health conditions.
